packet.scope: F04 CPU tranche: doe_P5 F01-F14; common registry and judge; method-specific admissibility; transform-by-family table

plan_f04_verbatim: 승계 — 공용 relation registry/judge + 방법별 게이트 분리(C11). doe_P5의 **effects/confirmation(발견 기능)을 명시 산출물로 복원**: transform×family 상호작용 표는 F04의 필수 보고서다 (판정 기능에 흡수 금지). CPU part = doe_P5 F01–F14(결정론+고전ML)

relation_registry.structured_relation: axis translated by the same vector; thickness unchanged
relation_registry.validity_gate: inverse transform restores endpoints and topology

relation_registry.structured_relation: axis rotated about bbox centroid; thickness unchanged
relation_registry.validity_gate: inverse rotation restores endpoints and topology

relation_registry.structured_relation: axis scaled about bbox centroid; thickness multiplied by absolute factor
relation_registry.validity_gate: factor is positive and inverse scaling restores geometry

relation_registry.structured_relation: raw coordinates and thickness scale while canonical millimetre quantities remain unchanged
relation_registry.validity_gate: coordinates, $INSUNITS, and scale_mm_per_unit encode the same physical quantities

relation_registry.structured_relation: world geometry unchanged with occurrence-level LID mapping
relation_registry.validity_gate: no remaining INSERT; occurrence mapping bijective; world topology unchanged

relation_registry.structured_relation: geometry and LID unchanged; layer map bijective
relation_registry.validity_gate: layer map bijective and geometry hash unchanged

relation_registry.structured_relation: shared logical vertices receive the same deterministic bounded dither
relation_registry.validity_gate: nonzero segments, unchanged incidence/topology, certified parallel-band margin, and input-only decision-margin certificate

families.required_artifact: exact frozen v0 method manifest; current v1 must not substitute
frozen HGBDT model, six-feature schema, threshold, and training manifest

common_required: family and method_id are explicitly identified
artifact, config, threshold, preprocessing, and dependency hashes are frozen
relation is supported by the method representation and route
transform validity certificate passes without consulting detector outcomes
occurrence-level LID map is complete and bijective with zero collisions
prediction schema is complete on a nonempty LID population
zero and near-all sentinels are detected and truth-bearing positive recall is at least 0.20

deterministic_v0: pipeline and detector readouts are not averaged
classical_ml: feature schema and threshold match the manifest
gnn: Graph-IR adjacency and LID order audit passes
vlm: vision support and exact pixel-to-LID inverse projection pass

admissibility_gates.decision: A cell receives a numeric band verdict only when every applicable gate is proven. Existing numbers without family/method identity or certificates remain preserved as legacy observations and do not populate a canonical family cell.

verdict_band.UNKNOWN: no admissible numeric measurement; never coerce to zero or PASS
verdict_band.INADMISSIBLE: numeric observation exists but one or more method/relation gates are unproven or failed

family_verdict_rule: After sentinel qualification, all seven cells PASS => PASS; any cell FAIL => FAIL; otherwise any INCONCLUSIVE => INCONCLUSIVE; any UNKNOWN or INADMISSIBLE prevents a complete family verdict.
effects_rule: Compute exact transform main effects, family main effects, and transform-by-family interactions only when all 28 canonical cells are admissible and numeric. Never impute missing cells.
evidence_precedence: b4_fold_v2 is the corrected strict fold for overlapping legacy transform observations
w2_independence_audit_v1 is retained as an older projection and is never averaged with or allowed to override b4_fold_v2
source strict verdicts and sentinel failures are preserved alongside any derived R-META value
mirror remains visible in the legacy evidence table but cannot populate T-META v1
